response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering fundamentals and recent exposure to AI-adjacent work (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq), he does not meet the fundamental requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—his explicit AI experience is limited to a 6-month role. Critical gaps include lack of Python expertise, no demonstrated knowledge of vector databases or RAG architectures, and limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership. The recent career gap (7 months) and absence of formal AI/ML credentials further diminish fit for a senior AI-focused role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with proven ability to architect complex distributed systems (microservices at Dunnhumby, GISCollective geo-data platform) and mentor others
Recent hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates emerging AI-infrastructure expertise aligned with modern LLM tooling
Solid TypeScript and AWS CDK expertise aligns with required tech stack; demonstrates cloud platform familiarity and cloud-native infrastructure design
concerns: Does not meet the minimum 8-year requirement for AI-specific experience; only 6 months of explicit AI/agentic systems work at re:cinq
No Python experience mentioned despite being listed as a required language; no evidence of vector database or RAG architecture expertise
Recently entered a career gap (October 2025–May 2026) and limited demonstrated technical leadership with enterprise customers or stakeholders on complex projects

key_factors.factor: No Python or RAG/vector database expertise
Recent hands-on agentic systems and MCP work
